content:
***《忘却前夜》社区共建·荣誉奖励***

亲爱的守密人：

在过去的日子里，我们见证了许多来自社区的温暖与创造力——有人自发整理攻略、有人组织玩家活动、有人构建起让新人不再迷茫的知识宝库。
这些事，从来不是官方要求的，却让这片社区变得更好。
我们想说：我们看见了。
为此，我们正式将「社区共建·荣誉奖励」纳入长期社区福利体系。这不是一次“活动”，而是我们对"让社区变得更好的人"的长期承诺。

✦ 什么是社区共建·荣誉奖励？
当社区中出现了需要团队协作、具有卓越价值的自发贡献项目时，官方会主动认定并向参与成员发放奖励。
例如：系统性的游戏内容图鉴、覆盖面广的攻略文档、对社区生态有实质帮助的组织行为……
如果你们做了这样的事，我们会主动与你们取得联系。

✦ 奖励是怎样的？
我们将视您的贡献项目具体情况，为您准备相应数额的银芯奖励，这些奖励将由全部项目的参与者平均分享。

✦ 我会知道奖励发放了吗？
每次发放，我们都会在社区发布正式公告，公告内容包括：
● 贡献项目的内容介绍
● 全体参与成员（游戏ID前两位+后三位）及其具体贡献
● 如：ID为123456789——显示为12***789
● 每位成员实际获得的奖励数额

我们希望让每一位贡献者都被社区看见，也希望让这份认可透明、公正。

✦ 官方如何联系获奖团队？
我们只会通过 Discord 正式校工主动联系项目的组织者，由其协助提供团队成员信息（包括游戏ID、参与日期及个人贡献说明，所有成员的提交均代表其本人同意信息将用于本次奖励发放）。

✦ 我需要报名或申请吗？
不需要。这份奖励不接受主动申请。我们会持续关注社区动态，在发现值得认定的贡献后主动跟进。

⚠️ 请注意防范诈骗：官方仅会通过 @正式校工 账号索取个人信息。如有人以"官方认定奖励"为由向你索取信息，请第一时间在官方客服频道核实，并保持警惕。

社区的成长，离不开每一个愿意多做一点点的人。
你们的付出值得被看见，也值得被感谢。

—— 忘却前夜运营团队

***[Announcement] Community Co-Creation & Honor Rewards***

Dear Keepers,

Over the past months, we've witnessed so much warmth and creativity from within this community — players who voluntarily compiled guides, organized community events, and built knowledge bases that helped newcomers find their footing.

None of this was asked of you. And yet, it made this community a better place.

We want you to know: we see you.
Today, we are officially integrating the Community Co-Creation & Honor Rewards into our long-term welfare system. This isn't just a one-time "event"—it is our long-term commitment to those who make our community a better place.

✦ What is the "Community Co-Creation & Honor Rewards"?
Whenever a high-value, collaborative, and spontaneous project emerges that benefits the community, the Official Team will recognize the contribution and issue rewards to the participants.
Examples include:
  -Comprehensive in-game content wikis
  -Widely referenced strategy guides
  -Organizational efforts that substantially improve the community ecosystem.
If you are working on something like this, we will reach out to you.

✦ What are the rewards?
Depending on the scope and impact of the project, we will provide a set amount of Silver rewards. These rewards will be shared equally among all project participants.

✦ How will I know when rewards are issued?
Every time rewards are issued, we will post an official announcement including:
  -A brief introduction to the recognized project.
  -A list of all participating members (first 2 + last 3 digits of their in-game ID)
   (Example: ID 123456789 → displayed as 12***789).
  -A description of each member's specific contribution.
  -The exact amount of rewards received by each member.

We want every contributor to be seen by the community, and we want this recognition to be transparent and fair.

✦ How will the team contact us?
We will only contact project organizers through the @Official Staff account on Discord. The organizer will then assist in gathering team information (including Game UIDs, participation dates, and personal contribution descriptions).
Note: By submitting information, all members agree to its use for reward distribution and public credit.

✦ Do I need to apply?
No. This reward program does not accept active applications. Our team will actively monitor community activities and reach out directly when we discover a contribution that deserves recognition.

⚠️ Scam Alert:
The Official Team will ONLY request personal information through the verified @Official Staff account. If anyone else asks for your info claiming to offer "Official Rewards," please verify it immediately in our Customer Support channel.

The growth of this community depends on those willing to go the extra mile.
Your efforts deserve to be seen, and they deserve to be thanked.

— Morimens Operations Team
